reasoning: Multiple highly credible sources (Axios, Politico, Punchbowl News, and The Washington Post) indicate that Rep. Haley Stevens decided to enter the race for the open Michigan Senate seat vacated by Senator Gary Peters, who announced his retirement in January 2025. Reports on April 10, 2025, stated she was 'imminently' launching her campaign, and a Washington Post article from April 21, 2025, confirms she has entered the race. Her social media also reflects this announcement. The timing is well before the May 1, 2025, deadline.
